nodes.label: AI as tool for lesson planning
nodes.grounding_span: I go back and forth. I would love to be able to let it handle things independently, but it is too difficult to get an end result that I would be satisfied with.

nodes.label: AI personalization to teacher's style and context
nodes.grounding_span: lesson plans should be personalised to the style and methods that are appropriate for both me and my students

nodes.label: AI reliability for grading and assessment
nodes.label_negative: AI errors undermining trust and accountability
nodes.grounding_span: It can still make mistakes and I think that can set bad standards for students

nodes.label: AI for PowerPoint slide generation
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to generate complete PowerPoints
nodes.grounding_span: I have not been satisfied with the ability of AI's to generate complete powerpoints for me

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: it gives me more time to focus on creating more interesting and engaging lessons

nodes.label: Teacher accountability and student trust
nodes.grounding_span: I should be the one accountable for my students work

nodes.label: Student-centered personalized education
nodes.grounding_span: create more interesting and engaging lessons

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it gives me more time to focus

nodes.label: Frustration with AI in complex Excel tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it usually creates a decent worksheet that needs few (if any) changes

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for PowerPoint generation
nodes.grounding_span: I have not been satisfied with the ability of AI's to generate complete powerpoints for me

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to reconsider grading
nodes.grounding_span: I don't let it do marking for me

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI personalization
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully, it gets better at understanding me and how I like to teach

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: By working together, I can give it more context over time and shape the results into something that I like

nodes.label: Adaptive integration — combines AI ideas with own existing concepts
nodes.grounding_span: I focus on enhancing or changing my skills so that I can use AI to come up with a better process/result
